source_title: AlphaVent PEEK suture anchor platform brochure (1000900464)
text: AlphaVent Versatile. Strong. Confidence in every repair. 6.5mm 5.5mm 4.75mm Hard-body, screw-in anchor platform Designed to perform Proprietary soft triple eyelet • Higher strength than eyelets of leading competitors’ anchors1 • Accommodates sliding and non-sliding sutures • Facilitates smooth suture sliding Dual-thread technology • Devised to improve anchor performance through optimized engagement in cortical and cancellous bone1 • Provides tactile feedback during cortical thread engagement Unobstructed cannulation meets complete venting • Allows exchange of blood and other autologous cells at the healing site • Variety of instruments for appropriate pilot hole creation • Conveniently, offered both sterile and non-sterile to meet customer and facility needs Versatile platform Needles safely stored in handle for relevant configurations 16mm length allows for multiple points of fixation without screw convergence in double-row repairs Tapered tip facilitates ease of insertionFully slotted driver allows for intraoperative screw re-engagement and removal Designed to comprehensively meet procedural and surgical technique needs: • Three anchor sizes • Ten different high-strength UHMWPE suture configurations • Sliding and non-sliding sutures • Needled and non-needled options • Instrumentation for all bone qualities Instrumentation for all bone qualities All-PEEK anchor body Product number Description
